purpose: The 6 galerina-web-* packages are deny-by-default by design, but every README states that rule in PROSE only — it fails OPEN the moment an implementation lands (CWE-79 XSS, CWE-601 open-redirect, CWE-501 trust-boundary, CWE-862 missing-authz). This contract makes the deny-by-default invariants a machine-readable, enforced spec BEFORE code exists. While a package is a stub (no src/ and no dist/) it is inert and cannot fail open; the contract is 'pending'. The moment a package gains an implementation it MUST ship the corresponding FUNGI-WEB-* fail-closed acceptance tests in the SAME change — enforced by scripts/audit-web-stub-guard.mjs (so an impl is born fail-closed, never fail-open).
failClosedDefault: unknown -> DENY (No-Coercion: a derived value never widens trust beyond what validation proved)
reuseMandate: web-* impls MUST consume the shipped deny-by-default machinery, NOT fork a parallel taint/sink engine: galerina-core-security (SecretTaint / combineTaint / checkSecretSink + the HTML/URL/log unsafe-sink list, generalised to WebTaint{trusted|untrusted-source|sanitised}) and galerina-data-html (the single SafeHtml sanitiser gate). If a future impl forks its own taint logic, re-audit — the invariant->primitive mapping assumes reuse.
acceptanceTestEvidence: An implemented package (has src/ or dist/) MUST contain a committed test file whose name matches /(failclosed|acceptance)\.test\./i exercising the FUNGI-WEB-* invariants below, each asserting the unknown->DENY / fail-closed behaviour. The guard requires this file's PRESENCE; the test's own assertions enforce the behaviour at run time.
buildOrder: web-render + web-state lead (every other package's safety is downstream of the render sanitiser gate and the state taint lattice); router/events/components are second wave; the web umbrella stays stub until children land.

invariants.rule: Text interpolated into the DOM is HTML-escaped by default; an unescaped text path cannot exist without an explicit RawText override token.
HTML input is rendered ONLY after passing the galerina-data-html sanitiser; an unsanitised HTML string reaching a DOM sink is a build error.
RawHtml is DENIED unless an explicit, reviewed override with environmentScope != production OR trusted is present; a RawHtml in a production render plan fails closed.
API data is schema-checked before it can be a render input (no untyped fetch -> render).
Every unsafe-render decision (sanitiser drop, override use) MUST appear in the web-render report; a silent unsafe render is a contract violation.
Unknown content classification is treated as RawHtml and DENIED (unknown -> DENY).

galerina-web-state.risk: trust-boundary laundering (CWE-501) — feeds every other package

invariants.rule: Data from API/storage/URL/event/worker carries an untrusted taint and CANNOT become typed state except via an explicit validate->convert step.
Validation failure produces an error/partial state, never a partially-trusted typed object (no 'validated-enough').
No-Coercion: the typed state derived from untrusted input is a SUBSET of what validation proved — laundering cannot widen trust.
Hydration/rehydration from storage re-validates; trusting serialized state verbatim (e.g. an attacker-set role) is denied.
Route params are validated against the typed route contract before use; an unvalidated param reaching a fetch/render is denied.
Navigation/redirect targets MUST resolve to an allowlisted (same-origin or explicitly allowlisted) destination; an externally-controlled redirect target fails closed.
Generated links reject javascript:/data:/vbscript: and other non-http(s) schemes by default.
Unknown/unparseable target -> DENY navigation (unknown -> DENY).
Raw browser Event objects are not exposed to app logic; only typed validated payloads cross the boundary.
Privileged actions (clipboard/fullscreen/geolocation/file/payment/popup) require a verified user-gesture in the same task; a programmatic invocation without gesture is denied.
Event payloads are schema-validated before becoming state input (ties to S1).
Unknown event type -> no state transition (deny).

galerina-web-components.buildOrder: BUILD-SOON (second wave, depends on render sanitiser gate)

invariants.rule: Slot/child content rendered as HTML goes through the same sanitiser gate as render R2; a prop/slot string cannot reach a DOM HTML sink unsanitised.
Component props are typed; an untyped/any prop reaching a render sink is a contract error.
Component effects must be DECLARED; an undeclared side-effect (network/storage/navigation) from a component is denied.
Unknown slot content type -> escaped-text, never HTML.

The umbrella enforces the pipeline ORDER validate->type->sanitise->diff->render->report; a render plan that skips the sanitise stage for HTML content is rejected at the umbrella boundary (composes R2 + C1).
